channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-10 17:40 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Holodeck by Grok Imagine extension video
item.description: Holodeck by Grok Imagine extension video

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine can make 30 second videos. Press extend. Imagine and create that reality.
item.description: Grok Imagine can make 30 second videos. Press extend. Imagine and create that reality.

item.title: @elonmusk: John Thune is a failure who needs to be removed from his leadership role in the Senate. He’s done.
item.description: John Thune is a failure who needs to be removed from his leadership role in the Senate. He’s done.

item.title: @elonmusk: If you participate you will get $1 from me and $25 as a Welcome Gift from X. You can connect a bank ...
item.description: If you participate you will get $1 from me and $25 as a Welcome Gift from X. You can connect a bank account to move money into the account at 6% yearly interest, set up a virtual debit card to spend that $25 while you order your physical metal debit card from the bank…

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 Money early public access will launch next month
item.description: 𝕏 Money early public access will launch next month

item.title: @elonmusk: The side that needs to build a wall to keep people from leaving is the bad side
item.description: The side that needs to build a wall to keep people from leaving is the bad side

item.title: @elonmusk: I know I love it so much
item.description: I know I love it so much

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine image Grok Imagine video Video extension with prompt "camera pan right"
item.description: Grok Imagine image Grok Imagine video Video extension with prompt "camera pan right"

item.title: @elonmusk: Senator Mike Lee explains the talking filibuster, which is literally just the filibuster.
item.description: Senator Mike Lee explains the talking filibuster, which is literally just the filibuster.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tell your Senator that you want voting integrity passed. Every other country has this!
item.description: Tell your Senator that you want voting integrity passed. Every other country has this!

item.title: @elonmusk: Thune needs to sings a different tune
item.description: Thune needs to sings a different tune

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
